positioning: A quiet prayer partner app that helps two Christians actually follow through in prayer — one prayer, one person, one day at a time.
avatar: Christians who want to pray with someone consistently but feel awkward, forgetful, guilty, or overwhelmed by group-heavy spiritual apps.
pain_scenes: saying you will pray and forgetting
not wanting another noisy group chat
wanting someone to know what you are carrying
starting strong and fading after three days
desired_outcomes: build a simple prayer rhythm with one person

visual_lane.style: pixel-art quiet sacred editorial backgrounds, symbolic not literal, gentle and reverent
